results.name: api_smoke
results.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "node scripts\run_sprint8_smoke.mjs; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; node scripts\run_sprint8_smoke.mjs }; exit $LASTEXITCODE"
